fixes.description: (LazyCat Auto-build) Open-source Agent Operating System - autonomous agents that work for you
fixes.author: RightNow-AI
fixes.description_zh: （懒猫微服自动构建）开源 Agent 操作系统 - 自主代理为你工作

openfang.setup_script:
# 创建数据目录并设置权限
mkdir -p /root/.openfang
mkdir -p /root/.openfang/data

CONFIG_FILE="/root/.openfang/config.toml"
API_KEY_FILE="/root/.openfang/.api_key"

# 读取现有 API Key
API_KEY=""
if [ -f "$API_KEY_FILE" ]; then
  API_KEY=$(cat "$API_KEY_FILE")
fi

# 如果为空或只有 "of_"，重新生成
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ] || [ "$API_KEY" = "of_" ]; then
  TS=$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)")
  RAND=$(head -c 4 /dev/urandom 2>/dev/null | od -A n -t x1 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' \n' || echo "a1b2")
  API_KEY="of_${TS}${RAND}"
  echo "$API_KEY" > "$API_KEY_FILE"
fi

echo ""
echo "=========================================="
echo "OpenFang API Key: $API_KEY"
echo "=========================================="
echo ""

# 自动检测 LLM Provider
PROVIDER="anthropic"
MODEL="claude-sonnet-4-20250514"
API_KEY_ENV="ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"

if [ -n "$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="anthropic"
  MODEL="claude-sonnet-4-20250514"
  API_KEY_ENV="ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$OPENAI_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="openai"
  MODEL="gpt-4o"
  API_KEY_ENV="OPENAI_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="openrouter"
  MODEL="openrouter/free"
  API_KEY_ENV="OPENROUTER_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$GEMINI_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="gemini"
  MODEL="gemini-2.0-flash"
  API_KEY_ENV="GEMINI_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$GOOGLE_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="gemini"
  MODEL="gemini-2.0-flash"
  API_KEY_ENV="GOOGLE_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$GROQ_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="groq"
  MODEL="llama-3.3-70b-versatile"
  API_KEY_ENV="GROQ_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$DEEPSEEK_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="deepseek"
  MODEL="deepseek-chat"
  API_KEY_ENV="DEEPSEEK_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$TOGETHER_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="together"
  MODEL="meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-Turbo"
  API_KEY_ENV="TOGETHER_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$MISTRAL_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="mistral"
  MODEL="mistral-large-latest"
  API_KEY_ENV="MISTRAL_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$FIREWORKS_API_KEY" ]; then
  PROVIDER="fireworks"
  MODEL="accounts/fireworks/models/llama-v3p3-70b-instruct"
  API_KEY_ENV="FIREWORKS_API_KEY"
elif [ -n "$OLLAMA_BASE_URL" ]; then
  PROVIDER="ollama"
  MODEL="llama3.2"
  API_KEY_ENV=""
elif [ -n "$VLLM_BASE_URL" ]; then
  PROVIDER="vllm"
  MODEL=""
  API_KEY_ENV=""
elif [ -n "$LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL" ]; then
  PROVIDER="lmstudio"
  MODEL=""
  API_KEY_ENV=""
fi

echo "Detected LLM Provider: $PROVIDER"

# 创建配置文件
echo "api_key = \"$API_KEY\"" > "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo 'api_listen = "0.0.0.0:4200"' >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo "" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo "[default_model]" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo "provider = \"$PROVIDER\"" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo "model = \"$MODEL\"" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
if [ -n "$API_KEY_ENV" ]; then
  echo "api_key_env = \"$API_KEY_ENV\"" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
fi
echo "" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo "[network]" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo 'listen_addr = "0.0.0.0:4200"' >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
